one_time_description: Impairment loss recognized on CDR Limited Partnership investment (reduced to zero from $630,500 cost) due to significant adverse change in expected future cash flows
economic_notes: OIB operates numerous business enterprises including campground, golf course, convenience store, desert cultural centre, forestry, management services, vineyards, ready-mix concrete, development, and holdings partnerships. Equity in earnings from business enterprises was $5,366,104. Band receives 26% of revenues from DISC funding agreements. COVID-19 pandemic created uncertainty over future cash flows.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED because investments in business enterprises (GBEs and GBPs) were only reviewed, not audited. Prior period restatement noted for replacement reserve, accounts receivable, and investments in business enterprises. OIB has 3 consolidated entities and 15 GBEs/GBPs accounted for by modified equity method. Impairment loss on CDR Limited Partnership investment recognized. No budget prepared for 2022 due to COVID-19 uncertainty. Equity in earnings from business enterprises ($5,366,104) is included in revenue but is non-cash. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + BC + FNHA + Federal + OTD + CMHC = $10,839,650. OSR includes equity in earnings, property tax, grants, rent, project referrals, ONA, investment, rebates, and other.
